prompt: I want to build a Stream Deck plugin that controls OBS Studio. I need buttons for: start/stop recording, toggle streaming, mute/unmute microphone, and a scene switcher. The scene switcher should show the current scene name on the button. I have a Stream Deck MK.2 (15 keys). OBS has a WebSocket API I can connect to. Build me the full plugin.
assertions: manifest.json exists with UUID in reverse-DNS format
manifest.json contains all 4 action UUIDs (record, stream, mute, scene)
manifest.json has CodePath pointing to bin/plugin.js
Scene action uses setTitle() to show current scene name
No PKCE OAuth code included (not needed for OBS WebSocket)
OBS WebSocket connection logic is present
